text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=020dff9f9564604959680378f0d1eed19ff9be0a

commit 020dff9f9564604959680378f0d1eed19ff9be0a
Author:     Matthias Andree <mandree@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2021-05-22 11:01:55 +0000
Commit:     Matthias Andree <mandree@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2021-06-04 21:50:58 +0000

    www/py-urlwatch: update to v2.23, add DOCS

    Add DOCS option (uses py-sphinx and GNU make) to build/install
    html and text documentation.

    Ensure build works for non-default Python flavors.

    Update TEST_DEPENDS to list additional self-test requisites.

    Changelog: https://github.com/thp/urlwatch/blob/2.23/CHANGELOG.md#223----2021-04-10

    PR:             256085

    Approved by:    kai@FreeBSD.org

 www/py-urlwatch/distinfo |  6 +++---
 2 files changed, 28 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)
